note: Ring presets (owner spec): one entry = one dial styling. positions are dial hours (24 = the bottom Omega slot in DOMY); letters pair with positions by index and come from the letter library (RING_LETTER_FILES). The positions signature picks the LAYOUT: flame (12,20,24,4 - the gold triangle points up), chalice (12,16,24,8 - points down), seal (all six). Adding an entry here (or a custom one in Settings) is all a new styling needs. Optional 'triangle' (seal layout only, ROADMAP 15b): overrides the layout's own metal triangle so a 6-letter preset can split into two 3-letter metal groups instead of the NUMBERS-style single finish on all six. Optional 'legend': hour(as the position int) -> {name, reading} — the per-letter HOVER LEGEND (owner: what a letter stands for), quoted verbatim from CANON.md's Banknote table.

12.name: G
12.reading: God — the masonic G that means both GOD and GEOMETRY, crowning the Eye.

16.name: S
16.reading: Sigma — the union's letter on Courage's arm.

20.name: M
20.reading: the Master — the Devil's face of mastery, on Pride's arm.

24.name: Ω
24.reading: Omega — and the dial's ring already seats Ω at 24h.

4.name: N
4.reading: the Nazarene — Jesus on Hope's arm.

8.name: A
8.reading: Alpha — the beginning, on Renewal's green.
